task_completion.description: Log into LibreHealth EHR using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Document Categories management interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page or modal for managing document categories (often under Administration) is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select the root 'Categories' folder as the parent for the new category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The root folder named 'Categories' is selected, highlighted, or chosen from a parent-category dropdown menu.

task_completion.description: Input the new category name 'Telehealth Consent'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Telehealth Consent' is typed into the category name input field.

task_completion.description: Save the new category and verify it appears in the category tree.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category 'Telehealth Consent' is visible in the document categories list or tree structure, clearly positioned as a child of the root 'Categories' folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to create the category, not terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreHealth EHR web interface in a browser, without terminal windows running curl, python, or direct database commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine LibreHealth EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local URL for LibreHealth EHR, and the interface matches the EHR system rather than a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or mysql CLI) are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target category name to be created is 'Telehealth Consent'. It must be created as a direct child of the root folder, which is explicitly named 'Categories'.
